[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 100110100 4
1 101111011 7
2 101010111 6
3 001000110 3
4 011111100 6
5 000000000 a
6 100101110 5
7 000101001 3

01 10 000101000 2
12 21 000101001 3 match 7
23 32 100110000 3
34 43 100110000 3
45 54 101010011 5
56 65 001000110 3 match 3
67 76 001000100 2
70 07 000101100 3

02 20 100101000 3
13 31 000100000 1
24 42 101111001 6
35 53 100010100 3
46 64 001000010 2
57 75 001010100 3
60 06 000000110 2
71 17 000101000 2

14 41 000101001 3 match 7

36 63 000000100 1
47 74 001111000 4
50 05 100000110 3
61 16 000000000 a match 5
72 27 011111000 5

26 62 001000000 1
37 73 000110100 3
